p3.l1: Building intelligent systems with Python, TypeScript, and LangChain

intro: From full-stack development to data pipelines, from LangChain integrations to enterprise architecture. From Bank of America to AI-powered startups.
My passion: optimizing systems that process millions of records monthly with zero SLA breaches.
portfolio: I have worked with: Bank of America, Queue Solutions, Flying Woks, Thales, Bharti Airtel.
Here are some of my most impactful projects.

intro: I'm Raghav Dabra (AMP), based in <ImageMelbourne>Melbourne, Australia</ImageMelbourne>, an AI Engineer and Full-Stack Developer specializing in production systems, data engineering, and AI integration.

2+ years
of enterprise experience at Bank of America owning mission-critical financial production systems.
Currently pursuing a Master of Software Engineering at the <ImageUniMelb>University of Melbourne</ImageUniMelb>, focusing on Machine Learning, Cloud Architecture, and Database Systems.

I've built AI-powered systems using Anthropic Claude API, LangChain RAG pipelines, and Cursor AI. Recognized with 1× Silver Award and 4× Bronze Awards for production excellence and preventing global market disruption.
Today I think in Python, TypeScript, SQL, and AI-first architectures. 7× IBM Cybersecurity certified.
clan: At Bank of America, I owned critical 4BD/6BD monthly financial production cycles for EMBS (Enterprise Mortgage-Backed Securities), orchestrating 5+ concurrent batch pipelines across 4 distributed database systems with zero SLA breaches across 18 months.

Built Python automation scripts that reduced critical cycle processing time by ~40%, eliminating recurring manual validation overhead across global financial reporting systems. Performed multi-source data reconciliation across millions of loan-level records monthly.

Led CRQ governance across 4 cross-functional global teams, managing 20+ production deployments with zero market-impact incidents. Contributed Java Spring enhancements; monitored via Splunk and AppDynamics. Resolved 12+ incident types with structured RCA and runbook documentation.

Recognized with 1× Silver Award for preventing potential global market disruption and 4× Bronze Awards for production stability and CRQ excellence. 7× IBM Cybersecurity certifications including penetration testing and incident response. Johns Hopkins University certification in Data Science and Machine Learning.
method: Building scalable systems requires more than just code—it demands understanding of distributed systems, data pipelines, production governance, and AI integration patterns.
I specialize in full-stack development, Python automation, data engineering, and AI-powered workflows using Claude API and LangChain RAG pipelines.
I emphasize Agile methodologies, TDD, production release governance, and continuous improvement for myself and teams. Experienced with microservices, 3-tier architecture, and SDLC.
If production excellence, technical innovation, and AI-first thinking come together, that's the ultimate satisfaction.
